item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Boeuf Stroganoff — a classic Russian braise of tender beef and mushrooms in arich, creamy sauce — served with boiled potatoes and topped with fresh herbs.Pickled cucumber on the side (6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Indonesian fried chicken with a crisp coating and juicy centre, served withfragrant jasmine rice and lalapan — fresh crisp vegetables. Lime and chilisauce on the side (1+2+3+15) GREEN DISH: I ndonesian spiced stir-fry with pea protein, fragrant jasmine rice and crispvegetables, topped with fresh herbs. Lime and chili sauce on the side (7+8+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Classic boeuf bourguignon with tender chuck roast, mushrooms, pearl onions andcrispy bacon, slow braised and served with creamy mashed potatoes (15) GREEN DISH: dish GREEN DISH: bourguignon with mushrooms, pearl onions and vegetables, slow cookedfor depth and warmth, served with creamy mashed potatoes

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Classic boeuf bourguignon with tender chuck roast, mushrooms, pearl onions andcrispy bacon, slow braised and served with creamy mashed potatoes (15) GREEN DISH: dish GREEN DISH: bourguignon with mushrooms, pearl onions and vegetables, slow cookedfor depth and warmth, served with creamy mashed potatoes

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Juicy beef patty in a rich mushroom and pepper sauce,served with a hearty root vegetable mash and topped with freshly choppedparsley. Pickled beetroot and cranberry jam on the side (6+11) GREEN DISH: Dish Hearty du Puy lentil patty in a rich mushroom andpepper sauce, served with a hearty root vegetable mash and topped with freshlychopped parsley. Pickled beetroot and cranberry jam on the side (6+11)
